title: Replace placeholder contact details with real phone number and email across the site

requirements.text: Replace all placeholder phone numbers and email addresses across the entire site with the real contact details: phone number 7006946979 and email arsalandezayker@gmail.com. This includes: the Contact page (displayed address block, Call Now button tel: link, WhatsApp button href), the Footer component (contact details section), the FloatingActionButtons component (Call Now tel: link and WhatsApp href using wa.me/917006946979), and the Navbar 'Call Now' CTA button.

quotes: Bro put this number and email on the site

acceptanceCriteria: The Contact page displays '7006946979' as the phone number and 'arsalandezayker@gmail.com' as the email address.
The 'Call Now' button on the Contact page has href='tel:+917006946979'.
The WhatsApp button on the Contact page links to 'https://wa.me/917006946979'.
The Footer contact section displays '7006946979' and 'arsalandezayker@gmail.com'.
The floating Call Now button links to 'tel:+917006946979'.
The floating WhatsApp button links to 'https://wa.me/917006946979'.
The Navbar 'Call Now' CTA button links to 'tel:+917006946979'.
No placeholder phone numbers (e.g., +91-XXXXX-XXXXX) or placeholder emails remain anywhere on the site.

constraints: Do not change any backend logic or data schema.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Use the Indian international format for WhatsApp links: wa.me/917006946979 (country code 91 + number).
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or layout.
